panel.label: Extra Ring Slots
config.extraRingSlots.name: Extra Ring Slots
config.extraRingSlots.description: How many extra ring slots to add (in addition to the 2 vanilla slots).
config.infiniteCombining.name: Infinite Ring Combining
config.infiniteCombining.description: Remove the cap on how many rings can be combined together.
config.AddCombinedDuplicateRingCap.name: Add Combined Duplicate Ring Cap
config.AddCombinedDuplicateRingCap.descr: Prevent the same ring from being combined into the same Combined Ring multiple times.  Only takes effect when 'Infinite Ring Combining' is enabled.
config.infiniteWeaponForging.name: Infinite Weapon Forging
config.infiniteWeaponForging.description: Remove the 3-gem cap on weapon forging (lets you keep applying gems to a weapon beyond level 3).
config.RemoveDiamondForgesCap.name: Remove Diamond Forges Cap
config.RemoveDiamondForgesCap.descriptio: Remove the cap on how many diamond forges can be used (lets you keep using diamond forges beyond level 3).
config.multipleEnchantments.name: Multiple Enchantments
config.multipleEnchantments.description: Allow stacking multiple enchantments on the same weapon or tool instead of replacing the existing enchantment.
config.verbose.logging.name: Verbose Logging
config.verbose.logging.description: Send lots of debug messages to the console.
config.uninstall.safety.paragraph: Rings stored in extra slots live in this mod's save data.  Before you uninstall the mod, click the button below to return them all to your inventory (or drop them at your feet if it's full).
config.uninstall.safety.button.tooltip: Toggling this returns every ring in your extra slots to your inventory.  Toggle and apply.
